description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.7.16 Docker image and a pip cache keyed by $CI_PROJECT_ID at $CI_PROJECT_DIR/pip-cache (PIP_CACHE_DIR variable set). Add a before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y pandoc, upgrades pip, installs opencv-python-headless, pillow, torch==1.13.0+cpu and torchvision==0.14.0+cpu from the PyTorch wheel index, and installs development requirements from develop.txt. Define a test stage with three jobs: doctest runs "make doctest", unittest runs "make unittest", and lint runs "make lint"; doctest and unittest are triggered on tags, on the master or develop branches, and on merge‑request events. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that installs IPython, builds the docs with "cd docs; make clean html; make html; cd ..", moves the generated HTML to a public/ directory, publishes public/ as an artifact, and runs when CI_SHOULD_DEPLOY=="1" with a tag or CI_SHOULD_DEPLOY=="2" on master. Also add a pypi job that installs twine, wheel, setuptools and build, runs "python -m build", checks the distribution with "twine check dist/*", and uploads to PyPI with "twine upload --skip-existing dist/*" when CI_SHOULD_DEPLOY=="1" with a tag (setting PYPIBUILD=1, PYPITEST=0), and a pypitest job that does the same but uploads to Test PyPI using the repository URL and $TEST_TWINE_PASSWORD when CI_SHOULD_DEPLOY=="1" on master (setting PYPIBUILD=1, PYPITEST=1).
